source_policy: Curated project-owned composition over this repo's own data/weapons_clone_wars.json and data/armor_clone_wars.json (both themselves derived READ-ONLY from C:\SW_MUSH). SW_MUSH is strictly read-only reference and is not consulted directly for this file. Data flows one way: out of SW_MUSH into data/.
source_note: Added 2026-07-02 (World-Depth Drop) to give the four loaded zones in data/zones_clone_wars.json distinct vendor variety instead of one flat catalog. Every item_keys entry below is drawn ONLY from weapons/armor already marked vendor_stocked:true in data/weapons_clone_wars.json and data/armor_clone_wars.json -- currently 10 weapons (hold_out_blaster, blaster_pistol, heavy_blaster_pistol, sporting_blaster, sporting_blaster_rifle, blaster_pistol_dl22, heavy_blaster_pistol_dl6h, knife, vibroblade, stun_baton) and 2 armors (blast_vest, blast_helmet) -- 12 items total, each used in at least one zone. No item is invented here and no vendor_stocked:false or contraband item (e.g. disruptor_pistol, faction-issued gear) is referenced, per the task constraint; 'heavier' framing for contested/lawless zones is expressed by which subset of the existing 12 vendor_stocked items is offered, not by unlocking non-stocked stock. vendor_npc_ids cross-reference data/npcs_clone_wars.json entries flagged vendor:true who plausibly run each zone's counter.

tatooine.mos_eisley.spaceport.flavor_note: Official spaceport vendors stick to legal sidearms and standard-issue protective gear for travelers clearing customs.

tatooine.mos_eisley.port_fringe.flavor_note: Fringe merchants deal in heavier sidearms and gray-market self-defense gear for smugglers and independent operators skirting the checkpoints.

tatooine.mos_eisley.market_district.flavor_note: The cantina district and Kayson's shop carry the widest civilian selection in the city: hunting rifles, sporting blasters, and everyday tools.

tatooine.dune_sea.flavor_note: Lawless desert trade favors the heaviest hardware the open market will still sell -- heavy pistols, hunting rifles, and blades for travelers who won't see a checkpoint again before Beggar's Canyon.
